debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

failed_attempts:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    by_contra hne
    have : x ∈ A \ {a} := And.intro hx hne
    exact h2 x this
  · intro hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1

    have : x ∈ A \ {a} := And.intro hx h

    rw [hx]
    exact h1
